channel.title: About on Jay Gandhi
channel.description: Recent content in About on Jay Gandhi

item.title: About Jay Gandhi
item.description:
Hi, I’m Jay Gandhi 👋

I am a Polyglot Software Engineer based in Bengaluru, India, with 9 years of experience architecting and building high-performance platforms, developer ecosystems, and large-scale infrastructure. My career spans scaling tech stacks from pre-seed startups to optimizing core platforms for global enterprises like ServiceNow.

I specialize in Platform Engineering, Distributed Data Systems, and Front-end Infrastructure. I enjoy working where systems engineering meets front-end performance—building tooling, frameworks, and foundational platforms that increase system predictability and accelerate development velocity.

item.title: Bookshelf
item.description:
Computer Science

Operating System and Computer Architecture

  • Computer Systems: A Programmer’s Perspective, 3/e
  • Operating Systems: Three Easy Pieces (Print )

Data-Intensive Systems & Databases

  • Designing Data-Intensive Applications: The Big Ideas Behind Reliable, Scalable, and Maintainable Systems by Martin Kleppmann
  • I 💟 Logs: Event Data, Stream Processing, and Data Integration by Jay Kreps (Co-author of of several Apache projects like Kafka, Samza and CEO of Confluent)
  • Database Internals: A Deep Dive into How Distributed Data Systems Work by Alex Petrov
  • Distributed Systems 4th edition by Marteen van Steen & Andrew S. Tanenbaum

Network

Business

  • The Lean Startup by Eric Ries
  • Zero to One: Notes on Start Ups, or How to Build the Future by Peter Thiel
  • Narconomics: How to Run a Drug Cartel
  • AI Snake Oil: What Artificial Intelligence Can Do, What It Can’t, and How to Tell the Difference
  • Let’s talk Money by Monika Halan
  • The Wisest Owl by Anupam Gupta

Fiction

Science Fiction

  • The Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Galaxy: A triology in five parts

Fantasy

  • Harry Potter : The Complete Collection
